title: AI insights for the Fit Engine v2 opt-in AI+ toggle (default off)
description: Produced by scripts/ai_estimates.py — DOCUMENTED, deterministic estimation rules authored by generative AI (this build), regenerable via the quarantined P10 workflow; the runtime never calls a model. EVERY field carries {value, source, why}: source 'measured' is a passthrough of measured 2021-2025 history (player_history OLS trajectory, environment_model cold splits); 'ai_estimated' is a documented rule filling a gap (fewer than 3 seasons, no team cold sample, no measured stack data). Values are hard-bounded to +/-0.25. This file only feeds the TEAM tab's opt-in toggle — game probabilities and meta.json weights are untouched by it. Validated by scripts/validate_data.py.

updated_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last regeneration.

default.description: The UI default for the AI layer. Always 'off' — the base deterministic fit engine is the default experience.

players.description: Map of projection key ('espn-<id>') -> insight record.

value.description: Per-year points-trend fraction. Measured: slope/200 PPR plus any negative age-curve residual. Estimated: the position age-curve slope prior. Clamped.

slope_pts_per_yr.description: The pts/yr the client cites in its reason line (measured OLS slope, or the estimated prior); null only when no usable trajectory existed.

value.description: Extra fraction of the flat v1 STACK_BONUS a stack with this player is worth. Position-pair default — always ai_estimated this build (no measured stack data).

pair.description: The position pair the default comes from.

value.description: Sub-32F win-pct delta for the player's team: measured per-team passthrough (clamped), the measured dome-team group delta as an ai_estimated fill, or 0 neutral.

n.description: Sample size behind the delta (team cold games, or group games for the dome fill).

weeks.description: 2026 weeks the team plays at an open-air cold-region venue in Nov-Jan — the weeks the Fit Engine names in its reason.

method_notes.description: One-paragraph statement of the rules, their AI authorship, and the P10 regeneration path.
